texto: Morality—like velocity—is relative. The determination of it depends on what the objects around you are doing. All one can do is measure one's position in relation to them
autor: never can one measure one's velocity or morality in terms of absolutes.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a never can one measure one's velocity or morality in terms of absolutes.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Morality—like velocity—is relative. The determination of it depends on what the objects around yo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, david-gerrold, star-hunt pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e star-hunt.
